indication: TECENTRIQ is a programmed death-ligand 1 (PD-L1) blocking antibody indicated as adjuvant treatment following resection and platinum-based chemotherapy for adult patients with Stage II to IIIA NSCLC whose tumors have PD-L1 expression on >= 1% of tumor cells, as determined by an FDA-approved test.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to atezolizumab for the adjuvant treatment following resection and platinum-based chemotherapy for adult patients with Stage II to IIIA non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) whose tumors have PD-L1 expression on >= 1% of tumor cells, as determined by an FDA-approved test.
raw_biomarkers: PD-L1 expression on >= 1% of tumor cells
